_comment: Skill router config for HumanOS. Hook user-prompt-submit.ps1 matches prompt against these rules and appends recommendations. Format: array de skills. Cada skill: name, enforcement (critical/high/medium/suggest), priority (critical/high/medium/low), description, keywords (array string), intent_patterns (array regex), filePatterns (array glob, opcional).

skills.name: iconsa-business-rules
skills.description: 26 reglas R1-R26 críticas: schemas prohibidos, no self-approval, sello, supervisor NULL fallback, request_number HUM-YYYY-NNNN, estados ticket, auth.users filter, encoding, SOP-driven chains.

skills.name: iconsa-supabase-migration
skills.description: Workflow migrations: nombre snake_case NNN_action_target, COMMENT obligatorio, RLS habilitada, helpers existentes, CHANGELOG entry [bd], external_ids tables si golden record.

skills.name: iconsa-rls-validation
skills.description: Validacion RLS post-cambio: queries Q1-Q5 (pg_policies + pg_class), verifica tablas HumanOS con RLS habilitada + policy count + sensitive tables R13.

skills.name: iconsa-form-implementation
skills.description: Implementacion de formularios HumanOS end-to-end. Patron: leer SOP -> form_schema -> approval_chain -> server action -> tests E2E. 24 form variants en 2 categorias.

skills.name: superpowers:test-driven-development
skills.description: Red-green-refactor: escribir test failing primero, minimo implementar para pass, refactor manteniendo green. Superpowers tdd skill.

skills.name: superpowers:writing-plans
skills.description: Superpowers writing-plans: spec -> plan con tasks atomicas, codigo completo en steps, self-review (spec coverage, placeholder scan, type consistency).

skills.name: grill-with-docs
skills.description: Matt Pocock grill-with-docs: interview riguroso para alinearse. Actualiza CONTEXT.md y crea ADRs inline en docs/adr/.

skills.name: diagnose
skills.description: Matt Pocock diagnose: loop disciplinado para bugs duros. Reproduce -> minimise -> hypothesise -> instrument -> fix -> regression-test.

skills.name: handoff
skills.description: Matt Pocock handoff: compactar conversacion actual a documento para que otra sesion Code continue. Usado con hook PreCompact.

skills.name: frontend-design:frontend-design
skills.description: Anthropic frontend-design: combate AI slop. Bold aesthetic choices, design tokens ICONSA (Navy #1B3A5C, etc), no fonts default.

skills.name: superpowers:requesting-code-review
skills.description: Superpowers code review: pre-commit checklist, identifica issues antes de submit (tsc, lint, RLS, COMMENT, business rules).

skills.name: superpowers:verification-before-completion
skills.description: Superpowers verification: gate por feature antes de marcar done. Tests + lint + tsc + build + RLS validation + business rules check.

skills.name: superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch
skills.description: Superpowers finishing: cierre overnight. Asegura tests verde, docs actualizados, CHANGELOG, tag version, ready to merge.

skills.name: iconsa-library-docs-check
skills.description: Verify external library APIs are current via Context7 before implementation. Avoids deprecated APIs from LLM training cutoff (Next.js 16 middleware->proxy, React 19, Tailwind 4, Supabase SSR, Zod 4, etc).
